message:
feat(dashboard): add routing info to metrics panel (ntm-i9sw)

- Extend AgentMetric struct with RoutingScore, IsRecommended, State fields
- Add fetchRoutingCmd to fetch routing scores from robot API
- Handle RoutingUpdateMsg to merge routing data with metrics
- Display routing score color-coded by value (green/yellow/red)
- Show star (★) indicator for recommended agent
- Display agent state inline in metrics panel
- Add comprehensive tests for routing display and data merging

Helps users understand routing decisions in the dashboard by showing:
- Score column/badge for agents
- Recommended agent indicator
- Agent state (waiting, generating, etc.)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
